description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers, or act as a styling detail to your outfit. This Leatherette belt from fastrack is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Made of Leatherette for durability and style Three fixed loop design to increase the smartness quotient Stylish and broad tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Brand name embossed below the buckle Care Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
